title: deer-flow.research.dispatch.error v1
description: Emitted by deer-flow's ResearchDispatchConsumer (packages/harness/deerflow/research_dispatch/consumer.py, _emit_error) when a dispatched research cycle fails: the meta_probe.py subprocess crashes, times out, or a previously-dispatched cycle is found stale (pending or running) on a recovery scan. Caller should retry the dispatch on receipt.

research_id.description: Identifier for the research request this error pertains to, if known.

error_type.description: Category of dispatch failure. Values as observed at call sites; a new category constitutes a schema-compatible additive change.

message.description: Human-readable detail, e.g. exit code, cycle_id, or staleness age.
